hotelImages.caption: Superior Single Separate Bath and Toilet for 1 Person - Non-Smoking - Guestroom
Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 1.24 km from property

snippets.snippet: The room is wide enough, and the staff were all hospitable.

address.address1: Jl. Perkasa Alam No.17, Kuta Alam, Kec. Kuta Alam

favoriteFeatures.name: Airport transfer
favoriteFeatures.tooltip: Airport transfer available! Additional charges may apply. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Airport transfer
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Airport transfer available! Additional charges may apply. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 5-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing
Physical distancing of at least 1 meter
Temperature check for guests and staff

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Very bad, I already ordered through the app and when I contacted via WhatsApp or came directly there was no response, don't stay here unless you want to regret it.
comments.originalComment: Sangat buruk saya sudah memesan melalui aplikasi ketika saya hubungi via WA maupun datang secara langsung tidak ada tanggapan, jangan menginap disini sebelum anda menyesal

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Не помешала бы звукоизоляция . Как внутри здания , так и снаружи . И воду погорячее можно организовать в душе .
comments.reviewPositives: Соотношение цены и качества прекрасное . Рядом много кафе . В здании чисто , красиво , комфортно, просторно . Место , где находится отель , рядом с центром города.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room is clean, and the staff is friendly. There is a shared refrigerator where you can enjoy delicious drinks and fruits. However, there was no staff around during the day, and I couldn't call a taxi. I asked a kind local person nearby for help, and I successfully made it to the airport.
comments.originalComment: 部屋もきれいだし、スタッフも親切。共有の冷蔵庫もあり飲料・果物が美味しくいただける。ただ、昼にスカッフがおらずタクシーが呼べなかった。ちかくの親切なアバさんにお願いして無事空港にたどりついた。

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: It was all fine but the prayer from the mosque is really loud and woke me up.
comments.reviewPositives: Very friendly owner and very nice location.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room is wide enough, and the staff were all hospitable.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
I loved this property so much! The location is perfect with many food choices, and coffee shops nearby. 

The guest house is quiet, clean and always smells so fresh. 
The best thing for me was the host Hadian he’s really the best host I’ve ever had we spent so much time together exploring the city and even his family treated me very well. 

The WiFi was fast and always working which is good for me as I used it for business.

I will definitely book this guest house again and stay for much longer next time.
comments.reviewTitle: The Best Stay I’ve Ever Had!
